ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd. #218 At 09:00 A.M.
Off Calendar Oct-23-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Michael Bonner, Esq. for Plaintiff Oslo Reinsurance Company.
Plaintiff's witness, Mr. Dean Westin was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants, Venca Int'l Partners LP. and Carolyn Gandolfo as follows:
Damages of $5,370,096.60
Costs of $578.00
Interest of $1,677,235.61
For the total of $7,047,910.21
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove Up In Scd. #218 At 09:00 A.M.

MINI MINUTES: Matter comes on in Dept. 611 for prove-up hearing following entry of default. MIchael Bonner appears as counsel for plaintiff. No statement of damages having been served on the defendants, the Court continues the matter for further hearing in Dept. 218 at 09:00 a.m. on October 23, 2003. Judge: Diane E. Wick; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; Reporter: Candace Yount. (D. 611)
